description_long: This is a stylized child figure with a dark complexion, large expressive eyes, and a round face. The child is wearing a short-sleeve shirt, knee-length shorts, and a baseball cap that fits snugly on the head. The figure is barefoot, with toes clearly modeled, and the arms are extended horizontally to the sides. The clothing fits loosely, and the cap has a slightly curved brim. The overall proportions are childlike, with a relatively large head and short limbs, and the figure appears to be in a neutral standing pose.
description: A stylized child wearing a short-sleeve shirt, shorts, and a baseball cap, standing barefoot with arms outstretched.
description_view_0: Front view showing the child's face, outstretched arms, and full outfit including the cap and bare feet.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the cap, nose, and the side of the shirt and shorts.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the cap, shirt, shorts, and both arms extended outward.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, cap, and the side of the body and legs.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeve t-shirt and knee-length shorts with a baseball cap
attribute_hairstyle: short hair mostly covered by a cap
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
